overview: This green pauper infect deck leverages low-cost creatures and equipment to rapidly accumulate poison counters. By equipping Rancor to threats like Ichorclaw Myr, you create unblockable attackers that bypass traditional defense. Mutagenic Growth serves as a versatile tool to clear blockers, draw cards, and push lethal damage when needed.
win_conditions: Deal 10 poison counters to an opponent through combat damage
Flood the board with unblockable infect creatures to overwhelm blockers
Cast Mutagenic Growth on your creatures to deal direct poison damage and draw into finishing resources

keep_criteria: Hands containing one or two one-drop infect creatures
Hands with Rancor and a creature to equip
Hands with at least two land cards for consistent mana flow
mulligan_criteria: Hands with zero lands or four or more lands
Hands lacking early infect threats or Rancor
Hands composed entirely of high-cost cards

early_game: Prioritize land drops to ensure consistent mana availability
Play Ichorclaw Myr or similar one-drops to establish early board presence
Attach Rancor immediately to create an unblockable threat
mid_game: Push poison damage every turn using trample and infect
Cast Mutagenic Growth on opponent's blockers to clear the path while drawing cards
Maintain board pressure to prevent the opponent from stabilizing
late_game: Flood the board with multiple infect creatures to exhaust opponent's removal
Use Mutagenic Growth as a finisher to deal direct damage and refill your hand
Leverage excess mana to equip multiple Rancors or cast additional threats

key_cards.name: Mutagenic Growth
key_cards.notes: Cast on your infect creatures to deal poison damage equal to their power and draw cards, or cast on opponent's creatures to remove threats while gaining value.

key_cards.name: Rancor
key_cards.notes: Attach to any infect creature to give +1/+1 and trample, ensuring it deals combat damage and pushes poison counters efficiently.

key_cards.name: Ichorclaw Myr
key_cards.notes: Provides a cheap, flying infect body that can be equipped with Rancor to apply immediate pressure and bypass early blockers.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize casting Rancor before attacking to avoid opponent interaction
Cast Mutagenic Growth after blockers are declared to maximize card draw and damage
Hold up mana for instant-speed responses if possible, though this deck is primarily sorcery-speed

matchups.advice: Race quickly by attaching Rancor to your largest threat and pushing poison every turn
Use Mutagenic Growth to draw into answers and apply steady pressure with multiple small infect creatures
Establish an early board presence with Ichorclaw Myr and Rancor before they can develop their game plan

metadata.source: Cards Realm + Cards Realm + Cards Realm + builder_llm_default
